findings.description: Kristian Fredrik Tollefsen Birkeland died on 23 December 1883 (in the Stavanger area, Rogaland, Norway).
supporting_sources: Norway, Church Books, 1797-1958 — burial entry for Christian Frederik Birkeland, 31 Dec 1883

findings.description: He was buried on 31 December 1883 at Stavanger, Rogaland, Norway.
